---
title: Allotax Test 
author: Fitz Koch
date: today
description: Seeing if we can generate prettier allotax with the package.
format: 
  html:
    html-math-method: mathjax
    fig-responsive: true
    toc: true
    toc-location: left
    theme: cosmo
    page-layout: full
  ipynb:
    wrap: none
execute: 
  cache: false 
editor:
    render-on-save: true
bibliography: /home/fitsl/library/zotero/fjk_library.bib
---

# Setup 

```{python}
import sys, os
from pathlib import Path

_project_root = Path.cwd()
while not (_project_root / "src").exists():
    _project_root = _project_root.parent
os.chdir(_project_root)
```

```{python}
from pathlib import Path
import random
from itertools import product

import srt
import pandas as pd
import chardet
import numpy as np
import seaborn as sns
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt  
from py_allotax.generate_svg import generate_svg
from py_allotax.utils import convert_csv_data

from src.hedonometer import parse_text, import_hedonometer_as_dict
```


```{python}
# constants
plt.style.use(["ggplot"])
IMG_WIDTH = 12
sns.set_palette("muted")
```



```{python}
generate_svg(
    "example_data/boys_2022.json",
    "example_data/boys_2023.json",
    f"test.pdf",
    "0.17",
    "Boys 2022",
    "Boys 2023"
)
```
